titleEn: AFIA celebrates Feed Industry Institute’s more than 80 graduates
contentHtml:
ARLINGTON, Va. — The American Feed Industry Association celebrates more than 80 new graduates of its biennial Feed Industry Institute (FII). The four-day immersive program held in Minneapolis, Minn., brought […]
